hero.eyebrow: For hourly work, unit work, and estimated earnings
hero.title: Understand clearly how much you worked and earned.
hero.subtitle: Alveryn helps you record hours, unit-based work, rates, and absences. It then shows totals, statistics, and comparisons by day, week, or month.

steps.title: Start with the things you already know.

items.title: Set your profile and rate
items.description: Choose your currency, preferred schedule, hourly rate, or the calculation rules you use.

items.title: Add daily work
items.description: Enter worked hours, breaks, or how many units you completed: orders, trips, rooms, products, or any other work type.

items.title: Review the results
items.description: See totals, estimated gross income, worked days, averages, and comparisons between periods.

features.title: A simple app for tracking your work.
features.subtitle: You do not need to remember formulas or maintain spreadsheets. Alveryn keeps the history and calculates consistently.

items.title: Hourly tracking
items.description: Enter start time, end time, and break. The app calculates worked minutes and hours.

items.title: Unit-based work
items.description: For work paid per item, enter quantity and value for each unit.

items.title: Rates and periods
items.description: When your rate changes, old entries stay calculated with the correct rate for that period.

items.title: Calendar and absences
items.description: See worked days, free days, and paid absences in a calendar that is easy to check.

items.title: Clear statistics
items.description: Track hours, estimated gross income, worked days, averages, and differences between two periods.

items.title: Installable on your phone
items.description: Use it quickly from your phone and add it to your home screen as a web app.

examples.title: What it can calculate for you
items: If you worked 08:00-16:30 with a 30-minute break, Alveryn records 8 worked hours.
If you completed 14 units at 3.50 EUR each, you immediately see the total for that work type.
If your rate changes next month, history stays calculated with the old rates.
If you want to compare two weeks, statistics show the difference by day.

calculations.title: Alveryn can track
calculations.note: Results are estimates for personal organization. Final payment depends on your contract, payslip, and employer rules.

final.title: If you want order in your hours, rates, and earnings, start with your first entry.
final.subtitle: Create your account, set your rate, and add the work types you use day by day.
